creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Stumbled across this gorgeous coffee shop recently and the interiors will take you to outer space (perfect if you’ve recently watched @projecthailmary!) but the coffees are also delicious, they have dedicated work space and they even do £5.90 waffle bowls - the best sweet treat! 🧇

📍 @bexcoffeeuk at @brunswicklondon, Unit 20, Brunswick Centre, WC1N 1AW
⏰ Open 8am-8pm Mon to Sat, and 9am-6pm on Sundays

#londoncoffeeshop #bexcoffee
